ddls:
CREATE TABLE "state_performance" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "gross_revenue" INTEGER /* Total gross revenue */,
  "show_count" INTEGER /* Total number of shows */,
  "occupancy_rate" REAL /* Average occupancy rate */,
  "tickets_sold" INTEGER /* Total number of tickets sold */,
  "fastfilling_count" INTEGER /* Number of fast-filling shows */,
  "soldout_count" INTEGER /* Number of sold-out shows */,
  "total_seats" INTEGER /* Total number of seats available in all cinemas within the state */,
  "average_ticket_price" REAL /* Average ticket price across all shows in the state */,
  "average_show_duration" REAL /* Average duration of shows in the state */,
  "marketing_campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the active marketing campaign (if any) */,
  "seasonal_event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the active seasonal event (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_performance_seasonal_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("seasonal_event_id") REFERENCES seasonal_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_performance_marketing_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("marketing_campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cinemas" (
  "cinema_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cinema */,
  "cinema_name" TEXT /* Name of the cinema */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the cinema is located */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the cinema */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the cinema */,
  "total_seats" INTEGER /* Total number of seats in the cinema */,
  "number_of_screens" INTEGER /* Number of screens in the cinema */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date when the cinema opened */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the cinema's data was last updated */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID of the cinema manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cinema_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cinemas_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cinemas_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES state_performance ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shows" (
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each show */,
  "cinema_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cinema where the show is held */,
  "show_type" TEXT /* Type of the show (e.g., 2D, 3D, IMAX) */,
  "screen_size" TEXT /* Size of the screen */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the show */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the show */,
  "fastfilling" INTEGER /* Indicates if the show is fast-filling */,
  "soldout" INTEGER /* Indicates if the show is sold-out */,
  "movie_title" TEXT /* Title of the movie being shown */,
  "movie_duration" REAL /* Duration of the movie */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Movie rating (e.g., PG, R) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the movie */,
  "subtitles" INTEGER /* Indicates if the movie has subtitles */,
  "audio_format" TEXT /* Audio format (e.g., Dolby 5.1, Atmos) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the show's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shows_cinema_id FOREIGN KEY ("cinema_id") REFERENCES cinemas ("cinema_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the show the ticket is for */,
  "ticket_price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was sold */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Specific seat number for the ticket */,
  "row_number" TEXT /* Specific row number for the ticket */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer who purchased the ticket */,
  "customer_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the customer */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the ticket's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupancy" (
  "occupancy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupancy record */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the show the occupancy record is for */,
  "occupancy_rate" REAL /* Occupancy rate for the show */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date the occupancy was recorded */,
  "total_seats" INTEGER /* Total number of seats in the show */,
  "occupied_seats" INTEGER /* Number of occupied seats in the show */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the occupancy data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupancy_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., cinema manager, regional manager, admin) */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the user is responsible for */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the user's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES state_performance ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the campaign is active */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent on the campaign */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the campaign's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_campaigns_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES state_performance ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasonal_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seasonal event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the seasonal event */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the event is active */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Current status of the event (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "total_attendance" INTEGER /* Total number of people attending the event */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the event's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasonal_events_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES state_performance ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., POS, Online Ticketing) */,
  "connection_string" TEXT /* Connection string to the data source */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Date and time when the data source was last synced */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
